items.feature: bounded record-like class import with field update method
items.rationale: A single plain class with one explicit instance field and one fixed field-update method can normalize into a canonical record declaration plus plain functions, but this slice remains importer-only and does not widen executable claims.

items.feature: explicit instance-field read/write normalization through a direct local call
items.rationale: The fixed self.value = step(self.value) method body reuses canonical field-place and direct-call syntax while broader Python object semantics remain deferred.
